case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS RATTANAWONG, SATHAPON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $937.02 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RATTANAWONG, SATHAPON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01
